ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference in which the game is played */,
  "predict_kp" INTEGER /* Prediction key point (for analytics purposes) */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the league */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the game */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee(s) for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game associated with the statistics */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team (home or away) */,
  "adj_off" REAL /* Adjusted offensive rating for the team */,
  "adj_def" REAL /* Adjusted defensive rating for the team */,
  "adj_tempo" REAL /* Adjusted tempo for the team */,
  "poss_off" REAL /* Offensive possessions for the team */,
  "poss_def" REAL /* Defensive possessions for the team */,
  "fg_off" REAL /* Field goals made rating for the team */,
  "fg_def" REAL /* Field goals allowed rating for the team */,
  "three_point_attempts_off" INTEGER /* Three-point attempts made by the offensive team */,
  "three_point_attempts_def" INTEGER /* Three-point attempts allowed by the defensive team */,
  "free_throws_made_off" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the offensive team */,
  "free_throws_made_def" INTEGER /* Free throws allowed by the defensive team */,
  "fouls_committed_off" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the offensive team */,
  "fouls_committed_def" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the defensive team */,
  "blocks_off" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the offensive team */,
  "blocks_def" INTEGER /* Blocks allowed by the defensive team */,
  "steals_off" INTEGER /* Steals made by the offensive team */,
  "steals_def" INTEGER /* Steals allowed by the defensive team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnover_statistics" (
  "turnover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnover statistics record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game associated with the turnovers */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team (home or away) */,
  "turnover_off" REAL /* Turnover rate for the offensive team */,
  "turnover_def" REAL /* Turnover rate for the defensive team */,
  "reb_off" REAL /* Offensive rebounds for the team */,
  "reb_def" REAL /* Defensive rebounds for the team */,
  "three_off" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage for the team */,
  "three_def" REAL /* Three-point shooting allowed percentage for the team */,
  "assists_off" INTEGER /* Assists made by the offensive team */,
  "assists_def" INTEGER /* Assists allowed by the defensive team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnover_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
